headline: Extra Space Storage Inc (EXR) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Financial Performance ...
summary: Extra Space Storage Inc (EXR) reports a 2% increase in core FFO and exceeds revenue projections, while navigating challenges in occupancy and acquisition markets.

headline: Extra Space Storage Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Extra Space Storage (NYSE:EXR) reported first-quarter 2026 core funds from operations (core FFO) of $2.04 per share, up 2% year-over-year, as management pointed to improving fundamentals and early signs that moderating new supply is supporting better revenue trends.
